records.question: Which campuses located in Turlock where the county is Stanislaus were established in 1957 and had exactly 395 undergraduate and at most 56 graduate enrollments in 2004, with campus fees of at least 1915 in or before 1996?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT campuses.id FROM campuses
JOIN csu_fees ON campuses.id = csu_fees.campus
JOIN discipline_enrollments ON campuses.id = discipline_enrollments.campus
WHERE discipline_enrollments.graduate <= 56 AND campuses.location = 'Turlock' AND discipline_enrollments.undergraduate = 395 AND discipline_enrollments.year = 2004 AND campuses.year = 1957 AND csu_fees.year <= 1996 AND campuses.county = 'Stanislaus' AND csu_fees.campusfee >= 1915
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Campuses.Id
FROM Campuses
WHERE Campuses.Location = 'Turlock'
  AND Campuses.Year = 1957
  AND Campuses.County = 'Stanislaus'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM csu_fees
    WHERE csu_fees.Campus = Campuses.Id
      AND csu_fees.Year <= 1996
      AND csu_fees.CampusFee >= 1915
  )
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM discipline_enrollments
    WHERE discipline_enrollments.Campus = Campuses.Id
      AND discipline_enrollments.Graduate <= 56
      AND discipline_enrollments.Undergraduate = 395
      AND discipline_enrollments.Year = 2004
  )

records.question: Which campuses exactly named California State University-Channel Islands are located in Camarillo?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT campuses.id FROM campuses
WHERE campuses.campus = 'California State University-Channel Islands' AND campuses.location = 'Camarillo'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Id FROM Campuses WHERE Campus = 'California State University-Channel Islands' AND Location = 'Camarillo'

records.question: Which campuses have related csu_fees, degrees, and enrollments records, and have enrollments with a total enrollment in the academic year exactly equal to 704?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT campuses.id FROM campuses
JOIN csu_fees ON campuses.id = csu_fees.campus
JOIN degrees ON campuses.id = degrees.campus
JOIN enrollments ON campuses.id = enrollments.campus
WHERE enrollments.totalenrollment_ay = 704
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Campuses.Id
FROM Campuses
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM csu_fees WHERE csu_fees.Campus = Campuses.Id
)
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM degrees WHERE degrees.Campus = Campuses.Id
)
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM enrollments WHERE enrollments.Campus = Campuses.Id AND enrollments.TotalEnrollment_AY = 704
)

records.question: What campuses had exactly 4228 degrees awarded and enrollments with an FTE of 6234 in the year 1959 or earlier?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT campuses.id FROM campuses
JOIN degrees ON campuses.id = degrees.campus
JOIN enrollments ON campuses.id = enrollments.campus
WHERE enrollments.year <= 1959 AND enrollments.fte_ay = 6234 AND degrees.degrees = 4228
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Campuses.Id
FROM Campuses
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM degrees
    WHERE degrees.Campus = Campuses.Id AND degrees.Degrees = 4228
)
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM enrollments
    WHERE enrollments.Campus = Campuses.Id AND enrollments.Year <= 1959 AND enrollments.FTE_AY = 6234
)

SELECT campuses.id FROM campuses

records.question: Which campuses had enrollments exactly in 1946 and CSU fees from 1996 or later?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT campuses.id FROM campuses
JOIN csu_fees ON campuses.id = csu_fees.campus
JOIN enrollments ON campuses.id = enrollments.campus
WHERE csu_fees.year >= 1996 AND enrollments.year = 1946
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Campuses.Id
FROM Campuses

    SELECT 1 FROM csu_fees
    WHERE csu_fees.Campus = Campuses.Id AND csu_fees.Year >= 1996
)
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM enrollments
    WHERE enrollments.Campus = Campuses.Id AND enrollments.Year = 1946
)

records.question: Which campuses located in San Luis Obispo have a year of 1901, total enrollment of at least 16394 but full-time equivalent enrollment of at most 15148, at least 3411 degrees awarded, and fees from the year 1996?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT campuses.id FROM campuses
JOIN csu_fees ON campuses.id = csu_fees.campus
JOIN degrees ON campuses.id = degrees.campus
JOIN enrollments ON campuses.id = enrollments.campus
WHERE campuses.year = 1901 AND enrollments.totalenrollment_ay >= 16394 AND degrees.degrees >= 3411 AND enrollments.fte_ay <= 15148 AND campuses.location = 'San Luis Obispo' AND csu_fees.year = 1996
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Campuses.Id
FROM Campuses
WHERE Campuses.Year = 1901
  AND Campuses.Location = 'San Luis Obispo'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM csu_fees
    WHERE csu_fees.Campus = Campuses.Id AND csu_fees.Year = 1996
  )
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM degrees
    WHERE degrees.Campus = Campuses.Id AND degrees.Degrees >= 3411
  )
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM enrollments
    WHERE enrollments.Campus = Campuses.Id
      AND enrollments.TotalEnrollment_AY >= 16394
      AND enrollments.FTE_AY <= 15148
  )

SELECT Campuses.Id
FROM Campuses
WHERE County = 'Los Angeles'
  AND Campus = 'Long Beach State University'
  AND EXISTS (

    FROM degrees
    WHERE degrees.Campus = Campuses.Id
      AND degrees.Degrees <= 4593
  )
